protocol.source_io_disclosure: a cutoff-crossing chunk may be physically decoded and immediately discarded; discarded rows never enter returned frames, hashes or computation
protocol.mechanism: separate directed HVGs for completed six-hour price returns and aggressive flow; follow the current sign of the layer with larger symmetric in/out degree-law mismatch
protocol.claim_disclaimer: HVG layer irreversibility is an observable time-asymmetry descriptor, not proof of causal direction or predictive edge
protocol.block: 72 completed 5m bars [T-6h,T), ending minute55 at UTC 00/06/12/18 boundary T
protocol.hvg_edge: i->j iff i<j and every intermediate value is strictly below min(x_i,x_j)
protocol.ordinal_novelty_reference: order-3 permutation entropy over the identical 168-block price window
protocol.gate: abs layer ratio > shift(1) prior 120-state q0.80, minimum 60
protocol.side: flow sign when flow irreversibility is larger; otherwise price-return sign
protocol.entry: signal at boundary minute00; enter minute05 open
protocol.selection: fit 2020-06..2022; one-shot 2023 plus fixed H1/H2; no 2024+
protocol.diagnostics_not_selected: entry 5/10/15 minutes and hold 6/12/24 hours reported without replacement selection
